display.purpose: Page heroes and major section headers. One per screen maximum.

headline.purpose: Recipe titles in modals, profile names, section headings.

title.purpose: Card overlays, onboarding step titles, sidebar section labels.

body.purpose: Recipe descriptions, message copy, settings prose. Max line length 65ch.

label.purpose: Form field labels, tag text, Nutri-Score badge, category chips. Always uppercase.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Always-on ambient shadow for recipe cards and content containers. Warm-tinted base.

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Recipe detail modals and any surface floating above content.

shadows.name: glow-orange
shadows.purpose: Orange halo on primary buttons and active accent states.

shadows.name: glow-orange-lg
shadows.purpose: Expanded orange glow on primary button hover.

motion.name: ease-revamp
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions — subtle spring gives tactility without bounce.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Image transitions and larger element entrances where spring would be too lively.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions: border color shifts, icon state changes.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Button hover, input focus, nav state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Orange gradient fill, Montserrat bold, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B35, #FF8C42); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 15px; padding: 16px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 14px; box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(255,107,53,0.35); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(255,107,53,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF6B35; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost button with glass-border stroke. Hover shifts to Ember Orange.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: oklch(18% 0.012 240); font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; padding: 16px 24px; border: 1.5px solid oklch(80% 0.012 240); border-radius: 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #FF6B35; color: #FF6B35; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #FF6B35; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Glass-surfaced field. Montserrat uppercase label above. Focus shifts border to Ember Orange.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; } .ds-label { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(45% 0.010 240); } .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); border-radius: 14px; padding: 14px 18px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: oklch(18% 0.012 240); outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #FF6B35; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(65% 0.008 240); }

components.name: Recipe Pin Card
components.description: Signature component. Full-bleed food photography with gradient overlay and tag/author chrome. Aspect ratio varies per card.
components.html:
HealthyQuick

Avocado Toast

@username
components.css: .ds-pin-card { position: relative; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); background: #111; aspect-ratio: 3/4; box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(30,20,10,0.10), 0 1px 4px rgba(30,20,10,0.06); transition: transform 300ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.2,0.64,1); } .ds-pin-card:hover { transform: scale(1.02); } .ds-pin-img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 500ms ease; display: block; } .ds-pin-card:hover .ds-pin-img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-pin-overlay { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; padding: 16px; padding-top: 48px; background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,0.85), rgba(0,0,0,0.40), transparent); pointer-events: none; } .ds-pin-tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-block; padding: 4px 12px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.20); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.30); border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-pin-title { font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: #ffffff; margin: 0 0 8px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-pin-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-pin-avatar-ring { width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.30); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2); } .ds-pin-author { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.70); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation Card
components.description: Glass card with icon + label nav items. Left sidebar on desktop, bottom bar on mobile.
components.html: DiscoverExploreSaved
components.css: .ds-sidebar-card { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); border-radius: 20px; padding: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(45% 0.010 240); text-decoration: none; transition: background-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,107,53,0.08); color: #FF6B35; } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(255,107,53,0.10); color: #FF6B35; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 18px; height: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Category Filter Chip
components.description: Filter pill for feed category selection. Active state uses Ember Orange tint.
components.css: .ds-filter-bar { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-filter-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 16px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(45% 0.010 240); cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, color 150ms ease; } .ds-filter-chip:hover { border-color: #FF6B35; color: #FF6B35; } .ds-filter-chip--active { background: rgba(255,107,53,0.10); border-color: rgba(255,107,53,0.30); color: #FF6B35; }

narrative.overview:
Nutrisipe is the digital equivalent of a kitchen table — the surface where food is shared, recipes are passed around, and cooking becomes communal. The visual system is warm, dimensional, and human. Every surface has slight texture from ambient shadows and translucent glass layers. Nothing is sterile; nothing is corporate. The UI makes room, steps back, and lets food photography claim the frame.

The design is food-first and warmth-forward. Orange acts as a hearth light — present, but never overbearing. Backgrounds carry a barely-there golden tint (warm parchment) rather than clinical white. Type is expressive in headings (Montserrat, heavy weights) and invisible in body copy (Inter, light enough to read without thinking). Rounded edges soften every surface, and generous shadows keep cards from feeling flat.

This system explicitly rejects the overcrowded food blog (walls of text, ad-polluted layouts, recipe content buried in life-story preamble) and the corporate SaaS dashboard (enterprise-blue, form-heavy, dense, treating recipes like data rows).
keyCharacteristics: Ambient warmth in every surface layer
Food photography fills the frame — UI decorates the edges, never competes
Orange as accent, not background color
Glass + backdrop-blur as the primary depth language for chrome elements
Generous radius everywhere — nothing has a sharp corner without reason
Montserrat for identity, Inter for clarity

rules.name: The Ember Rule
rules.body: Ember Orange appears on ≤15% of any given screen's painted area. Its warmth is the point; abundance destroys it.

rules.name: The No-True-White Rule
rules.body: #ffffff and #000000 are forbidden. Backgrounds tint toward warm (hue ~55–60); darks tint toward cool (hue ~240).

rules.name: The Montserrat Gate
rules.body: Montserrat is identity type only — headings, buttons, labels, brand mark. Never for body paragraphs, never below 600 weight.

rules.name: The Warm Shadow Rule
rules.body: All shadows use warm-tinted black (rgba ~20–40 hue), never neutral gray. rgba(30,20,10,...) reads as depth; rgba(0,0,0,...) reads as dirt.

rules.name: The Glass Layer Rule
rules.body: Glass (backdrop-blur 20px, 18% opacity fill) is reserved for persistent chrome: sidebar, header panels, modal backdrops. Never on recipe cards.

dos: Do let food photography fill the full card frame.
Do use warm-tinted shadows (rgba(30,20,10,...) family) on every elevated surface.
Do use --radius-card (24px) as the minimum corner radius for content containers.
Do apply backdrop-blur: 20px on all persistent chrome.
Do vary aspect ratios in the feed grid — preserve the hash-derived ratio system.
Do label every form field with Montserrat Label style (uppercase, 11px, 0.1em tracking).
Do ensure all text on food photography passes WCAG AA via gradient overlays.
donts: Don't use pure #ffffff or #000000 — every neutral is tinted.
Don't use Ember Orange as a background color for sections or full-bleed areas.
Don't build walls of text before recipe content — no overcrowded food blog patterns.
Don't apply enterprise or SaaS visual patterns — no corporate SaaS dashboard patterns.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient — use solid Ember Orange instead.
Don't apply glassmorphism to recipe cards or content containers — glass is for chrome only.
Don't use Inter below 400 weight or Montserrat below 600 weight.
Don't adjust the Nutri-Score badge colors for brand alignment — they are regulatory.
